title: Replace 2D wave mode with a 3D secondary mode

testFiles.description: Unit tests for the RibbonField geometry system — a 3D ribbon-of-points mode replacing the 2D WaveField

tests.description: init creates points based on density and maxPoints config
assertions: Point count does not exceed maxPoints config

tests.description: same seed produces same initial point configuration
assertions: Identical seeds produce identical position arrays

tests.description: different seeds produce different configurations
assertions: Different seeds produce different position arrays

tests.description: draw does not throw with valid FrameState
draw does not throw with edge-case params (zero bass, zero treble, no pointer)
assertions: draw() completes without throwing with zero energy and no pointer

tests.description: draw does not throw at boundary parameter values
assertions: All boundary parameter combinations complete without throwing

tests.description: init adds THREE.Points to scene (not THREE.Line or THREE.Group of Lines)
assertions: Exactly one THREE.Points mesh is added to the scene
No THREE.Line objects are added (confirming 3D point-based mode, not 2D lines)

tests.description: points have position, color, size, aHueOffset, aRandom buffer attributes
draw updates shader uniforms including bassEnergy and trebleEnergy
assertions: uTime uniform is updated to current frame time

tests.description: bass and treble are mapped to distinct uniforms (uBassEnergy vs uTrebleEnergy)
assertions: Setting only bassEnergy updates uBassEnergy but not uTrebleEnergy
Setting only trebleEnergy updates uTrebleEnergy but not uBassEnergy
Bass and treble are independently controllable

tests.description: cleanup removes mesh from scene and disposes geometry/material
assertions: THREE.Points mesh is removed from scene

tests.description: no localStorage or cookie access during ribbon operations
point positions have non-zero Z-depth confirming 3D distribution
assertions: Z values span a range greater than 1.0, confirming true 3D distribution

tests.description: mesh uses ShaderMaterial with vertex and fragment shaders
material uses additive blending with transparency and depthWrite disabled
mesh rotation changes over elapsed time (Y-axis drift)
assertions: Y rotation changes between elapsed=0 and elapsed=5000

tests.description: colors derive from paletteHue (uPaletteHue uniform reflects param)
assertions: uPaletteHue uniform tracks the paletteHue visual param

tests.description: low motionAmplitude produces smaller uMotionAmplitude uniform than high
assertions: Higher motionAmplitude param produces higher uMotionAmplitude uniform value

tests.description: density parameter scales effective point count (higher density = more points)
point count never exceeds the configured maxPoints
assertions: Point count respects maxPoints cap even at maximum density and complexity

imports: import { describe, it, expect, vi } from 'vitest';

testFiles.description: Update integration test T-026-24 to use RibbonField instead of WaveField

tests.description: mode manager works with real ParticleField and RibbonField
tests.replaces: T-026-24: mode manager works with real ParticleField and WaveField
assertions: Mode manager initializes without throwing with real ParticleField and RibbonField
Drawing at multiple elapsed times (crossing switch boundaries) does not throw

importChanges.note: Import is dynamic (await import) inside the test, so the top-level import list does not change — only the dynamic import path inside T-026-24 is updated

filesToDelete.reason: WaveField is fully replaced by RibbonField; these tests are no longer applicable

T-034-13: point positions have non-zero Z-depth confirming 3D distribution
T-034-14: mesh uses ShaderMaterial with vertex and fragment shaders
T-034-15: material uses additive blending with transparency
Second mode is also audio-reactive (bass: T-034-09: draw updates shader uniforms including bassEnergy and trebleEnergy
T-034-10: bass and treble are mapped to distinct uniforms (uBassEnergy vs uTrebleEnergy)
Mode selection and switching remain seed: T-034-02: same seed produces same initial point configuration
T-034-03: different seeds produce different configurations
T-026-24: mode manager works with real ParticleField and RibbonField
Switching does not break audio playback: T-026-24: mode manager integration test — switching between real systems does not throw
T-034-11: cleanup removes mesh from scene and disposes geometry/material

createRibbonField.signature: createRibbonField(config?: { maxPoints?: number; enableSparkle?: boolean }): GeometrySystem
createRibbonField.description: Factory function returning a GeometrySystem with init(), draw(), cleanup()

getPointCount.description: Returns the number of active points in the ribbon field (for testing)

getPointPositions.description: Returns a copy of the position buffer array (for testing determinism)
